events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"high","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":85,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.85,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Missing load reactor on long motor leads from VFD to motor","Long motor leads without output/load reactor risk dv/dt voltage spikes, reflected wave damage to motor insulation, and nuisance VFD faults","Installation does not match OEM requirements for lead length limits"],"actions":["Install appropriately sized load/output reactor or dV/dt filter per VFD OEM manual based on actual motor lead length","Verify motor lead length and confirm reactor sizing before energizing for extended operation","Perform insulation resistance check on motor windings before re-energizing"],"rationale":"VFD output to motor over long leads requires a load reactor/dV/dt filter to limit reflected wave peak voltages and protect motor insulation per OEM guidance; omission is a non-compliant installed defect at rough-complete stage.","references":["NEC 430","VFD manufacturer installation manuals"]}
